title: dryopteris peranema
intro: Dryopteris peranema, also known as the Autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris peranema include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
